caption: The video features an older woman with short, curly gray hair and glasses, wearing a red top. She is seated in what appears to be an office setting, with a filing cabinet and some stacked items visible in the background. The woman seems to be engaged in a conversation or interview, as she is looking slightly off-camera and appears to be speaking. In the second image, text overlays identify her as "Michèle D. Pierre-Louis," noting her title as "Ex Premier Minister d'Haïti, Chair IEG." The setting suggests a formal discussion, possibly related to her professional experience or expertise.
